# GitHub assets

## Logo

To show the project logo in the root [README.md](../README.md), add a PNG named **`LeanEdge-RL.png`** in this directory (`/.github/assets/`). Recommended: transparent background, reasonable width (e.g. 400–800 px) for crisp display on GitHub.

If the file is missing, the README image link will appear broken until you add the asset.

## Other assets

You may add additional images (diagrams, badges) here. Keep filenames descriptive and reference them with repo-relative paths from markdown (e.g. `.github/assets/diagram.png`).
